sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2025-06-06 19:09
- Distance: 5.1 km
- Moving time: 23:35
- Elapsed time: 23:35
- Elevation gain: 34 m
- Average heart rate: 176.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 184 bpm
- Average watts: 248.6 W
- Average speed: 13 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `177.4 bpm`, ranging from `175.4` to `180.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `177.6 spm`, with a working range of `149.1` to `180.6 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `178.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `176.3 spm` (-2.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `4:37 /km` across `5.104 km` in `23:35` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `4:23 /km` and second-half pace was `4:51 /km` (+28 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `176.3 bpm` average and `184 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `175.2 bpm` in the first half and `177.2 bpm` in the second (+1.9 bpm), which reads as broadly stable across the run.

- Moving time was `23:35` out of `23:35` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `48.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.2 m` and `11.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `24.8 m` in the first half and `23.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
